name: Medusa Frontier
short_description: Medusa Frontier is a budget sci-fi survival game being developed with OpenGL & C++. Gameplay is currently limited to resource gathering and base building on a 1k terrain map.
detailed_description:
Medusa Frontier is a science fiction themed open world survival game being developed using a custom engine.
Gather resources, build a base, and explore a large open world.

Current Features include.
--------------------------------
*Base building & Hover Vehicles.
*Resource gathering from objects and terrain
*Small download size. Less than 100megs.
*Budget GPU friendly rendering & shaders
*Simple and responsive inventory and GUI.

Please Note!
This is an Early Access game in development.
Features and art style may change during Early Access.
Current mapsize is limited during Engine Revisions.
Updates may cause save file and base construction resets.
